title: First Sight of Yggdrasil
summary: Ada directly perceives the higher-dimensional branch nexus and confirms that ancient world-tree accounts were compressed witness reports.

narrative.newInfo: Fermi paradox inversion confirmed: contact source is parallel human lineage, not external aliens.
narrative.dripHook: Book 2 question: how does society absorb this without collapse?
narrative.beautyHooks: Myth, mathematics, memory, and measurement collapse into one image.
